data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your TuneShine device (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or tuneshine-E0C4.local)

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered TuneShine
zeroconf_confirm.description: Found **{name}** at `{host}`. Add it to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the host address and ensure the device is running firmware 2.3.0 or later.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the device during discovery.

data_description.source_entity_id: Mirror cover art and metadata from this media player onto TuneShine. Leave empty to use only TuneShine's own music source.

send_image.name: Send Image
send_image.description: Display an image on the TuneShine LED display.

image_url.name: Image URL
image_url.description: URL of the image to display. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

track_name.name: Track
track_name.description: Track or song name to associate with the image.

artist_name.name: Artist
artist_name.description: Artist name to associate with the image.

album_name.name: Album
album_name.description: Album name to associate with the image.

service_name.name: Service
service_name.description: Name of the source service (e.g. 'Home Assistant', 'Roon').

animation.name: Animation
animation.description: Override the transition animation for this image change.

clear_image.name: Clear Image
clear_image.description: Remove the locally-provided image and revert the display to music mode.
